metadata.description: Base name used to derive all resource names. Maps to AZURE_ENV_NAME.
Primary location for global resources. Maps to AZURE_LOCATION.
SKU for Azure Container Registry. Premium required for geo-replication.
Cosmos DB autoscale max throughput (RU/s) at database level. Minimum 1000.
Domain name for Azure DNS zone (e.g. alwayson.actor).
Region configurations as an array of objects with location and optional overrides.
Domain name for Azure DNS zone.
Domain name for the parent DNS zone (e.g. alwayson.actor).

resources.name: [guid(resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', format('id-aks-{0}-{1}', parameters('baseName'), parameters('regionKey'))), resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', format('id-kubelet-{0}-{1}', parameters('baseName'), parameters('regionKey'))), variables('managedIdentityOperatorRoleId'))]

[guid(resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', format('id-certmanager-{0}-{1}', parameters('baseName'), parameters('regionKey'))), resourceId('Microsoft.Network/dnsZones', format('{0}.{1}', parameters('regionKey'), parameters('domainName'))), variables('dnsZoneContributorRoleId'))]
[format('deploy-wiring-{0}', parameters('regions')[copyIndex()].key)]

aksClusterId.value: [reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, format('rg-{0}-{1}', parameters('baseName'), parameters('regions')[copyIndex()].key)), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('deploy-region-{0}', parameters('regions')[copyIndex()].key)), '2025-04-01').outputs.aksClusterId.value]

kubeletPrincipalId.value: [reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, format('rg-{0}-{1}', parameters('baseName'), parameters('regions')[copyIndex()].key)), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('deploy-region-{0}', parameters('regions')[copyIndex()].key)), '2025-04-01').outputs.kubeletIdentityPrincipalId.value]

childDnsNameServers.value: [reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, format('rg-{0}-{1}', parameters('baseName'), parameters('regions')[copyIndex()].key)), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('deploy-region-{0}', parameters('regions')[copyIndex()].key)), '2025-04-01').outputs.childDnsNameServers.value]

metadata.description: Child DNS zone nameservers (for NS delegation).
